body.title: Igor operating modes: Awake/Background/Sleep
body.result: Four biological modes: Foreground/Default/Consolidation/Dreaming. Derived from milieu + input recency + clock. mode_config() per mode. 14 tests.
body.description: D352-D354 implemented the gating primitives. Next: formalize three operating modes. AWAKE: conversation gate ON, user dominates TWM, habits yield to engaged responses. BACKGROUND: topicked work (coding, reading, training), conversation gate OFF, graph+local LLM. SLEEP: graph-only consolidation, no LLM at all (D353 already built). Each mode has different routing rules, different model ceilings, different TWM policies. Modes are the architectural frame for progressive LLM replacement — graph handles more in each mode over time.
